connection_type.title: Intellipool – connection type
connection_type.description: Choose how to connect to your Intellipool controller.

local.title: Local connection
local.description: Enter the IP address of your Intellipool INTP-1010B. The integration will probe common API endpoints automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the IP address and network.
error.endpoint_not_found: No local API found on the device. See README for protocol discovery instructions.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.
